messages.content: Build a typed city weather picker in RxJS v7 using setup-free operators. When the selected city id changes, cancel the in-flight weather request.
Build a typed user-profile loader in RxJS v7 where each new `userId` cancels the previous HTTP request.
What's the v7 way to cancel an in-flight search when a new query arrives? Show a minimal example.
How do I reload a dashboard whenever the active tenant id changes, cancelling any pending load? Show a small RxJS v7 example.
Explain briefly how switchMap cancellation works in RxJS v7, then show a working typed implementation for a route-based data fetch.
Build a typed RxJS v7 pipeline that processes upload jobs **one at a time**, in arrival order. Each job returns a server receipt.
Build a typed RxJS v7 command dispatcher that runs each command strictly after the previous one finishes.
What's the RxJS v7 way to guarantee inner observables run sequentially, never concurrently? Show a minimal example.
Explain briefly how concatMap preserves order in RxJS v7, then show a typed implementation for writing log lines to a remote service.
Write an RxJS v7 pipeline that processes payment intents. Constraints: strict types, no `any`, strict FIFO order, and each payment must finish before the next begins.
Build a typed RxJS v7 image thumbnail worker that processes up to 4 jobs concurrently.
Build a typed RxJS v7 pipeline that issues up to 3 HTTP requests in parallel and streams the results as they arrive.
How do I run up to 5 inner observables concurrently in RxJS v7 without racing beyond that? Show a minimal example.
Explain briefly the difference between switchMap, concatMap, and mergeMap(..., n) in RxJS v7, then show a bounded-parallel fetcher.
Write an RxJS v7 pipeline that streams email-send jobs. Constraints: typed events, at most 8 concurrent sends, no `any`.
Build a typed RxJS v7 HTTP call that retries up to 3 times with exponential backoff, then falls back to an empty list.
Build a typed RxJS v7 feature-flag loader that retries twice on error and falls back to a default config.
What's the RxJS v7 way to retry a failing observable with exponential backoff? Show a minimal example.
How do I catch an RxJS v7 stream error and emit a default value instead of failing? Show a minimal example.
Explain briefly why catchError and retry compose well in RxJS v7, then show a typed implementation.
Write an RxJS v7 observable that loads user settings with graceful degradation. Constraints: strict types, no `any`, up to 3 retries with linear backoff, final fallback is a typed default.
Build a typed RxJS v7 interval poller that stops cleanly when a `destroy$` Subject emits.
Build a typed RxJS v7 stream that exposes server events and automatically completes when the component's `destroy$` fires.
What's the RxJS v7 way to auto-unsubscribe long-lived streams when a component unmounts? Show a minimal example.
Explain briefly the takeUntil-destroy pattern in RxJS v7, then show a typed implementation for a chat message feed.
Build a typed RxJS v7 observable that reads `Date.now()` at subscription time (not at factory-call time) using defer.
Build a typed RxJS v7 cold observable wrapping a Promise-returning function so the Promise is created per subscription.
What's the RxJS v7 way to lazily create an observable so the side effect runs per subscriber? Show a minimal example.
Explain briefly why defer matters in RxJS v7, then show a typed implementation that reads `performance.now()` at each subscribe.
Write an RxJS v7 cold observable that returns a fresh request id per subscribe. Constraints: strict types, no `any`, use defer.
Build a typed RxJS v7 HTTP call that logs `start` via tap and `done` via finalize (fires on both complete and error).
Build a typed RxJS v7 pipeline that toggles a loading flag via BehaviorSubject â€” on at subscribe, off at finalize.
What's the RxJS v7 way to run cleanup code on both success and failure? Show a minimal example.
How do I use tap with the observer object form in RxJS v7 to log next/error/complete? Show a minimal example.
Explain briefly the difference between tap and finalize in RxJS v7, then show a typed pipeline that uses both.
Write an RxJS v7 pipeline that fetches a resource. Constraints: strict types, no `any`, use tap for logging and finalize to clear a loading flag on both success and failure.
